title: cyperus ciliatopilosus
intro: Cyperus ciliatopilosus is a species of sedge, a type of aquatic or semi-aquatic plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its rhizome, which has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Cyperus ciliatopilosus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent the spread of infections. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or a powder, and is also used in traditional medicine to make herbal teas and infusions.
